creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
So that the CVE's notified by Apache Software Foundation, on their mailing list is actioned/tracked.  For details please review

https://lists.apache.org/thread.html/1ac11532235b5459aa16c4e9d636bf4aa0b141d347d1361e40cc1b78@%3Cannounce.apache.org%3E

There are some performance and security enhancements also included with 3.1.2 apart from addressing issues that are reported "in the wild".
